# Roget Concept

> François Roget is a senior full-stack developer, software architect, and technical trainer based in Belgium with 20+ years of experience. He specialises in React, TypeScript, and frontend architecture, offering freelance IT consultancy and developer training services remotely worldwide.

## Services

### IT Consultancy
With 20+ years of hands-on experience in frontend and fullstack development, François helps companies design, build and scale high-quality web applications. Whether you need a React expert, a solution architect, or a seasoned developer who can hit the ground running — he brings clarity, velocity, and long-term thinking to your projects.

- React & TypeScript architecture reviews and hands-on development
- Fullstack integration with Java and PHP backends
- Technical leadership and code quality improvement
- Pragmatic, no-nonsense solutions focused on business results

### Technical Training
Tailored training sessions for modern web development with React, TypeScript, Nx, and more. From hands-on workshops to advanced architecture courses, trainings are designed to be practical, engaging, and immediately applicable.

- React, TypeScript and Nx workshops for all levels
- Advanced architecture and micro-frontend courses
- Hands-on sessions, immediately applicable on real projects
- Onboarding programmes for junior and senior developers

## Expertise

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, Micro Frontends, Module Federation
- Backend: Node.js, Java, PHP
- Architecture: Software Architecture, Nx Monorepos, Micro Frontends
- Quality: Testing Library, Cypress, code review, best practices
- Mentoring: Technical leadership, team coaching, developer onboarding
- Writing: Technical articles on Medium (5+ published)

## Clients

Eurocontrol, Be.Brussels, Ingenico, Worldline, Keytrade Bank, Paynovate, APB, Tunz

- https://medium.com/@francois-roget/how-to-build-a-dynamic-micro-frontend-architecture-in-react-95ce548cb775 — How to Build a Dynamic Micro-Frontend Architecture in React

## Apps

### Paniers
A smart, privacy-focused shopping list that syncs in real time across all Apple devices. No servers, no ads — end-to-end iCloud encryption. Built with SwiftUI, CoreML, and CloudKit.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/paniers/id6759610076
- Website: https://paniers.app
